---
title: "About this blog"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/kodehjornet/kodehjornet.github.io
---

This blog features posts on data analysis and coding with `R` by students at the University of Stavanger (UiS) in Norway. 

It was originally created by Petter Knardahl and Knut Solvig as a website for the *Coding Corner* project in 2023 and it is now used as a platform for current students that want to showcase their coding skills or present research projects involving quantitative methods.

The website is now maintained by Carlo Knotz (Associate Professor at UiS). If you have any questions, feel free to contact him via <carlo.knotz@uis.no>.
